description_long: This object is a large, loosely draped garbage bag with a dark, metallic brown coloration and a soft, flexible appearance. The bag's surface is highly wrinkled and features deep folds and creases, suggesting it is made from a thin, pliable plastic material. Its irregular, slumped shape indicates it is only partially filled, with some areas sagging and others slightly elevated. The surface has a subtle sheen, reflecting light in a way that highlights the smoothness of the plastic. No visible closure or tie is present, and the bag appears to be resting directly on the ground. There are no visible labels, logos, or markings on the exterior.
description: A large, dark brown, loosely draped garbage bag with a shiny, wrinkled plastic surface and no visible closure, resting on the ground.
description_view_0: The bag appears slumped with deep folds and a shiny, dark brown surface, showing the most expansive and draped side.
description_view_1: This view highlights a pointed, elevated section and a pronounced opening at the bottom, emphasizing the bag's irregular shape.
description_view_2: The bag is seen from the opposite side, showing a smoother, more stretched surface with fewer deep folds.
description_view_3: A narrow, end-on view reveals the bag's pointed tip and a long, trailing fold, with less visible surface area.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: partially filled with some sagging and loose folds
